name: Weekly Sprint — Metrics Analysis → AI Sprint Planning → Task Generation

nodes.name: Every Monday 8:00 AM
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Trigger weekly sprint planning every Monday

parameters.query: SELECT platform, SUM(views) as total_views, SUM(likes) as total_likes, SUM(shares) as total_shares, SUM(comments) as total_comments, SUM(clicks) as total_clicks FROM platform_metrics WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY platform

nodes.name: Fetch Last Week Metrics
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Collect platform metrics from database

nodes.name: Fetch Active Goals
nodes.notes: Pull current goals for OpenClaw analysis

parameters.name: message

nodes.name: OpenClaw: Sprint Planning
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: OpenClaw (BRAIN)
AI analyzes metrics, creates sprint plan, recommends content strategy

nodes.name: Create Sprint Record
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Store sprint in database
